name: scafld.capture_checks
description: Capture the native `scafld checks --json` payload without treating a failing check as a tool failure.

task_id.description: Primary scafld task id to inspect.

fixture.description: Optional fixture workspace root used during dev and harness execution.

cwd.description: Optional working directory override for the scafld invocation.

scafld_bin.description: Optional explicit scafld executable or path.
